commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Overmuch. No sin can be tolerated. (Calmet)
But as all offend in many things, (ver. 21.; Haydock) they are encouraged to rise again with diligence and sorrow.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Be not overmuch wicked: That is, lest by the greatness of your sin you leave no room for mercy.
